title: LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
company: LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Subject Matter Expert based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners:
LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners!
